features.name: Nob Hill Nature Park
features.description: A small forested nature park with walking trails, native plants, and bird watching opportunities in the Nob Hill enclave.

features.name: Overton Park
features.description: Small neighborhood pocket park with benches and green space in the heart of the Northwest District.

features.name: Columbia Park
features.description: A 152-acre park with walking paths, an off-leash dog area, and sports fields along the Columbia River, one of Portland's largest parks.

features.name: Laurelhurst Park
features.address: SE Cesar E Chavez Blvd & Stark St, Portland, OR 97215
features.description: A historic 26-acre park featuring a pond, horseshoe pits, basketball courts, and a playground. One of Portland's most beloved parks.

features.name: Forest Park
features.description: One of the largest urban forests in the US at 5,200 acres with extensive hiking trails and forested areas.

pocket_parks_nearby.name: Northwest District Pocket Parks
pocket_parks_nearby.description: Several small pocket parks along NW Lovejoy and NW Northrup streets with benches and pedestrian paths, providing gentle green space throughout the neighborhood.
